creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
This suggestion isn't PR fodder though:
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/problem-reports/pr-when.html

most closely, "Please do not submit problem reports that simply state that a newer version of an application is available.".  (not an direct match but you get the idea).

There's a place for "wish" lists on ports (I'm not sure how effective that is) and you can always actually create the port yourself.
